faqs.commonProblemTitleEn: How can I participate in the exhibition?
faqs.commonProblemAnswer:
第一步：提交《参展申请表》
登陆官网（www.worldaic.com.cn）首页，点击“菜单-大会服务-资料下载”，即可下载参展申请表，填写完整后发送给大会联系人邮箱即可。
第二步：确认展位
提交《展位申请表》后，请耐心静候佳音。大会联系人会根据申请表提交的先后顺序，致电联系您并发送展位图纸，确认展位具体事宜。
第三步：签署协议并支付展位费用
展位确认后，请于规定期限内签订《参展合同》，加盖公章后回传给大会联系人，并根据合同要求按期支付展位费用，逾期则视为自愿放弃展位，且主办方有权追究相关法律责任。
第四步：展台设计及展品准备
大会工作人员将提供贵司《展商手册》，参展企业须按相关要求及时间节点提交相应参展材料。光地展商确认展位后，即可根据展位面积、位置制定搭建方案。
第五步：现场报到
faqs.commonProblemAnswerEn:
Step 1: submit the exhibition application form

Log in to the home page of the official website (www.worldaic. Com. CN), click "menu - Conference services - data download", you can download the exhibition application form, fill in it and send it to the conference contact email.




Step 2: confirm the booth

After submitting the booth application form, please wait patiently for good news. According to the order of submission of the application form, the contact person of the conference will call you and send the booth drawings to confirm the specific matters of the booth.




Step 3: sign the agreement and pay the booth fee

After the booth is confirmed, please sign the exhibition contract within the specified period, affix the official seal and return it to the contact person of the conference, and pay the booth fee on schedule according to the contract requirements. If it is overdue, it will be deemed as voluntary abandonment of the booth, and the organizer has the right to investigate relevant legal liabilities.



Step 4: booth design and exhibit preparation

The staff of the conference will provide your exhibitor's manual, and exhibitors must submit corresponding exhibition materials according to relevant requirements and time nodes. After the bare land exhibitors confirm the booth, they can formulate the construction scheme according to the booth area and location.



Step 5: report on site

faqs.commonProblemAnswer:
1.光地展位租赁费2,580元/㎡或360美元/㎡，36㎡起租，提供一块场地，不包含其他任何物品及搭建设施。
2.标准展位租赁费27,720元/9㎡（3,840美元），或55,440元/18㎡（7,672美元），含基础搭建，包括地毯，楣板，插座，射灯等。
faqs.commonProblemAnswerEn:
1. The rental fee for the bare booth is ¥2,580/㎡ or $360/㎡, starting from 36㎡. A site is provided, excluding any other items and construction facilities.

2. The rental fee of standard booth is ¥27,720/9m² ($3,840) or ¥55,440/18m² ($7,672), including foundation construction, including carpet, lintel, socket, spotlight, etc.

faqs.commonProblemTitle: 什么时候可以选择展位并拿到展位图纸?
faqs.commonProblemTitleEn: When can I choose the booth and get the booth drawings?
faqs.commonProblemAnswer: 展位由大会主办方统一规划安排，3月31日后将启动第一批次报名企业的展位安排工作。
faqs.commonProblemAnswerEn: The booth will be uniformly planned and arranged by the organizers of the conference. The booth arrangement of the first batch of registered enterprises will be started after March 31.

faqs.commonProblemAnswer: 参展合同签署完毕后，企业按合同要求支付费用。增值税专用发票一般情况下在企业付款后20个工作日内开出并按合同地址发顺丰快递至贵司。
faqs.commonProblemAnswerEn: After signing the exhibition contract, the enterprise shall pay the expenses according to the contract requirements. Generally, the special VAT invoice shall be issued within 20 working days after the enterprise makes payment and sent to your company by SF express according to the contract address.

faqs.commonProblemTitle: 历届合作伙伴及合作媒体有哪些？
faqs.commonProblemTitleEn: What are the previous partners and cooperative media?
faqs.commonProblemAnswer:
微软、亚马逊、IBM、谷歌、阿里巴巴、腾讯、百度、华为、科大讯飞、中国移动、国家电网、上汽、ABB、发那科、商汤、滴滴等一批行业巨头及独角兽企业参展。
第一财经、人民日报、解放日报、新华社、央视网、腾讯新闻、学习强国、凤凰网、新浪微博、爱奇艺、知乎、小红书、bilibili、机器之心、亿欧、智东西等大众及行业媒体全方位报道。
faqs.commonProblemAnswerEn:
Microsoft, Amazon, IBM, Google, Alibaba, Tencent, Baidu, Huawei, iFLYTEK, China Mobile, State Grid, SAIC, abb, FANUC, sensetime, didi and other industry giants and unicorn enterprises participated in the exhibition.

YiCai, people's daily, Jiefang Daily, Xinhua news agency, CCTV, Tencent News, learning power, Phoenix, Sina Weibo, iqiyi, Zhihu, xiaohongshu, bilibilibili, machine heart, yiou, Zhidong and other mass and industrial media reported in an all-round way.

faqs.commonProblemTitle: 合作伙伴有哪些类型可供选择？
faqs.commonProblemTitleEn: What types of partners are available?
faqs.commonProblemAnswer: 大会合作伙伴根据合作深度，等级划分为：战略合作伙伴、卓越合作伙伴、精英合作伙伴、创投生态合作伙伴等。合作伙伴名额有限，先到先得。
faqs.commonProblemAnswerEn: According to the depth of cooperation, the partners of the conference are divided into top partners, strategic partners, excellent partners, elite partners and designated partners. The designated partners cover translation, travel, financial services, human resources services and technical support. Partner quota is limited, first come, first served.

faqs.commonProblemTitle: 如何成为世界人工智能大会合作伙伴？
faqs.commonProblemTitleEn: How to become a partner of the WAIC?
faqs.commonProblemAnswer: 请致电021-20893590与大会展览团队联系，大会提供一系列展前、现场和全年度的权益推广机会帮助贵司提升品牌曝光度和行业影响力。
faqs.commonProblemAnswerEn: Please contact the exhibition team at +86 021-20893590. The conference provides a series of pre exhibition, on-site and annual equity promotion opportunities to help your company improve brand exposure and industry influence.

guide_detail.introduction:
大会位置图和交通指引  

上海世博中心

地址：上海市浦东新区世博大道1500号

机场

浦东国际机场—世博中心

出租车：车程约50分钟；

地铁：

方案一：乘坐2号线至人民广场站，换乘8号线至中华艺术宫（4号口）下，步行10分钟至世博中心。

方案二：乘坐2号线至龙阳路站，换乘7号线至耀华路站，换乘8号线至中华艺术宫站（4号口）下，步行10分钟至世博中心。

虹桥机场—世博中心

出租车：车程约55分钟； 

地铁：

方案一：乘坐2号线至人民广场站，换乘8号线至中华艺术宫（4号口）下，步行10分钟至世博中心。

方案二：乘坐10号线至老西门站换乘8号线至中华艺术宫（4号口）下，步行10分钟至世博中心。

方案三：乘坐10号线至新天地站换乘13号线至世博大道站（4号口）下，步行10分钟至世博中心。

火车站

上海火车站—世博中心

出租车：车程约30分钟；

地铁：

方案一：可乘坐1号线到人民广场站，换乘8号线至中华艺术宫站（4号口）下，步行约10分钟到世博中心。

方案二：可乘坐1号线到汉中路站，换乘13号线至世博大道站（4号口）下，步行约10分钟到世博中心。

上海南站—世博中心

出租车：车程约20分钟； 

地铁：可乘坐1号线到人民广场站，换乘8号线至中华艺术宫站（4号口）下，步行约10分钟到世博中心。

上海虹桥火车站—世博中心

出租车：车程约45分钟;

地铁：

方案一：乘坐10号线至老西门站换乘8号线至中华艺术宫（4号口）下，步行10分钟至世博中心。

方案二：乘坐10号线至新天地站换乘13号线至世博大道站（4号口）下，步行10分钟至世博中心。
guide_detail.introductionEn:
WAIC Venue and Transportation Map

Shanghai Expo Center (SECC)

Address: 1500 Shibo Ave, Pudong New Area, Shanghai

From Airport

Pudong International Airport - SECC 

Taxi: Approx. 50 mins

Metro:

Option 1: Take Line 2 to People's Square, transfer to Line 8 to China Art Museum (Exit 4), and walk 10 minutes to SECC 

Option 2: Take Line 2 to Longyang Road, transfer to Line 7 to Yaohua Road, transfer to Line 8 to China Art Museum (Exit 4), and walk 10 minutes to SECC

Hongqiao International Airport - SECC

Taxi: Approx. 55 mins

Metro:

Option 1: Take Line 2 to People's Square, transfer to Line 8 to China Art Museum (Exit 4), walk 10 minutes to SECC

Option 2: Take Line 10 to Laoximen, transfer to Line 8 to China Art Museum (Exit 4), walk 10 minutes to SECC 

Option 3: Take Line 10 to Xintiandi, transfer to Line 13 to Shibo Avenue (Exit 4), walk 10 minutes to SECC

From Train Station

Shanghai Railway Station - SECC

Taxi: Approx. 30 mins

Metro:

Option 1: Take Line 1 to People's Square, transfer to Line 8 to China Art Museum (Exit 4), and walk 10 minutes to SECC

Option 2: Take Line 1 to Hanzhong Road, transfer to Line 13 to Shibo Avenue (Exit 4), and walk 10 minutes to SECC 

Shanghai South Railway Station - SECC 

Taxi: Approx. 20 mins

Metro: Take Line 1 to People's Square, transfer to Line 8 to China Art Museum (Exit 4), and walk 10 minutes to SECC 

Shanghai Hongqiao Railway Station - SECC 

Taxi: Approx. 45 mins

Metro:

Option 1: Take Line 10 to Laoximen, transfer to Line 8 to China Art Museum (Exit 4), and walk 10 minutes to SECC 

Option 2: Take Line 10 to Xintiandi, transfer to Line 13 to Shibo Avenue (Exit 4), and walk 10 minutes to SECC
